parameters.query: SELECT ap.id, ap.config, ap.status, ap.activated_at, ap.updated_at, ac.nom, ac.code, ac.categorie, ac.complexity FROM automation_purchases ap JOIN automation_catalog ac ON ac.id = ap.automation_id WHERE ap.tenant_id = '{{ $json.body.tenantId || $json.tenantId }}'::uuid AND ap.automation_id = '{{ $json.body.automationId || $json.automationId }}'::uuid

SELECT id, action, champ_modifie, ancienne_valeur, nouvelle_valeur, user_email, user_role, created_at FROM automation_config_logs WHERE automation_purchase_id = '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
